title: Unions, Unknown Values, and Control-Flow Narrowing · Contract Lens: Built In Narrowing
summary: Convert an unknown status feed into trusted records using evidence-producing guards and exhaustive decisions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts built in narrowing increment in an unknown-to-domain validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Narrow with typeof, equality, truthiness, in, instanceof, and discriminant checks while respecting edge cases.
Choose unknown, any, and never from trust, escape-hatch, and impossibility semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
